title: projectENIGMA
description: A kitchen sink pack for Cold War-like multiplayer scenarios.
body:
# projectENIGMA
![Project ENIGMA banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf563464ff1aa3e406dd348df938f57ecc72dda5.png)

Tired of no packs being optimal for competitive multiplayer? Well so was I, so I made this pack.

## Features

Give or take, every big mod available for this version, including:
- Create
- Applied Energistics 2
- Ad Astra
- Botania
- Hephaestus

and many others!

## Performance

This pack could run on pretty much anything.

## Disclaimer
This is my first pack, and I don't have that much free time, considering its current state it might take a few months to get to a proper stable release, and even then, I don't guarantee this pack to be good.
